languages.text: The user restores full AP/MP, gain 10 extra attacks, and until the end of his turn he deals +100% damage and can't be stunned, immobilized, fall prone or fall unconscious. At the end turn the user falls unconscious

traits.locale_text: The user restores full AP/MP, gain 10 extra attacks, and until the end of his turn he deals +100% damage and can't be stunned, immobilized, fall prone or fall unconscious. At the end turn the user falls unconscious

languages.text: The user restores {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} to their maximum, gains +10 additional attacks, and until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, deals +100% more damage and cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, or fall unconscious. At the end of the turn, the user falls unconscious.

traits.locale_text: The user restores AP and MP to their maximum, gains 10 additional attacks, and until the end of the turn, deals +100% more damage and cannot be stunned, immobilised, fall prone, or fall unconscious. At the end of the turn, the user falls unconscious.

The user restores {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} to their maximum, gains +10 additional attacks, and until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, deals +100% more damage and cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, or fall unconscious. The user restores AP and MP to their maximum, gains +10 additional attacks, and until the end of the turn, deals +100% more damage and cannot be stunned, immobilised, fall prone, or fall unconscious. At the end of the turn, the user falls unconscious.

languages.text: Персонаж восстанавливает все {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}ОД{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}ОП{/g}, получает +10 дополнительных атак, а также до конца своего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} наносит на 100% больше урона и не может быть {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}оглушен{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}обездвижен{/g} или {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}опрокинут{/g}, а также не может потерять сознание. Завершая свой ход, он теряет сознание.

Персонаж восстанавливает все {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}ОД{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}ОП{/g}, получает +10 дополнительных атак, а также до конца своего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} наносит на 100% больше урона и не может быть {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}оглушен{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}обездвижен{/g} или {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}опрокинут{/g}, а также не может потерять сознание. languages.text: El usuario recupera el máximo de {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PM{/g}, gana +10 ataques adicionales y, hasta el final del {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, inflige +100 % de daño y es inmune a quedar {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}aturdido{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}inmovilizado{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}derribado{/g}, o inconsciente. Al terminar su turno, el usuario queda inconsciente.
languages.original_text: The user restores {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} to their maximum, gains +10 additional attacks, and until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, deals +100% more damage and cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, or fall unconscious. At the end of the turn, the user falls unconscious.

traits.locale_text: El usuario recupera el máximo de {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PM{/g}, gana +10 ataques adicionales y, hasta el final del {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, inflige +100 % de daño y es inmune a quedar {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}aturdido{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}inmovilizado{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}derribado{/g}, o {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}inconsciente{/g}. languages.text: Der Nutzer regeneriert {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}BP{/g} auf ihr Maximum, erhält +10 zusätzliche Angriffe, verursacht bis zum Ende des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} +100 % mehr Schaden und kann nicht {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}betäubt{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}gelähmt{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}hingestreckt{/g} oder bewusstlos werden. Am Ende des Zuges verliert der Nutzer das Bewusstsein.
languages.original_text: The user restores {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} to their maximum, gains +10 additional attacks, and until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, deals +100% more damage and cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, or fall unconscious. At the end of the turn, the user falls unconscious.

traits.locale_text: Der Nutzer regeneriert {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}BP{/g} auf ihr Maximum, erhält +10 zusätzliche Angriffe, verursacht bis zum Ende des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} +100 % mehr Schaden und kann nicht {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}betäubt{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}gelähmt{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}hingestreckt{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}bewusstlos{/g} werden. Am Ende des Zuges verliert der Nutzer das Bewusstsein.

languages.text: L'utilisateur récupère tous ses {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} et {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PD{/g} et gagne +10 attaques supplémentaires. De plus, jusqu'à la fin du {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, il inflige +100 % de dégâts, est invulnérable aux effets {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}Étourdissement{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}Immobilisation{/g} et {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}Paralysie{/g}, et ne peut pas perdre connaissance. À la fin du tour, il perd connaissance.
languages.original_text: The user restores {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} to their maximum, gains +10 additional attacks, and until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, deals +100% more damage and cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, or fall unconscious. At the end of the turn, the user falls unconscious.

traits.locale_text: L'utilisateur récupère tous ses {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} et {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PD{/g} et gagne +10 attaques supplémentaires. De plus, jusqu'à la fin du {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, il inflige +100 % de dégâts, est invulnérable aux effets {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}Étourdissement{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}Immobilisation{/g} et {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}Paralysie{/g}, et ne peut pas {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}perdre connaissance{/g}. À la fin du tour, il perd connaissance.

languages.text: Kullanıcının {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}HP{/g} değerleri yeniden maksimum düzeye çıkar. +10 ilave saldırı kazanır. {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Turu{/g} sonlanana dek +%100 daha fazla hasar verir ve {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}sersemletilemez{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}felç edilemez{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}yere devrilemez{/g} veya baygın düşürülemez. Kullanıcı, turu sonlandığında baygın düşer.
languages.original_text: The user restores {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} to their maximum, gains +10 additional attacks, and until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, deals +100% more damage and cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, or fall unconscious. At the end of the turn, the user falls unconscious.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcının {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}HP{/g} değerleri yeniden maksimum düzeye çıkar. +10 ilave saldırı kazanır. {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Turu{/g} sonlanana dek +%100 daha fazla hasar verir ve {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}sersemletilemez{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}felç edilemez{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}yere devrilemez{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}baygın düşürülemez{/g}. Kullanıcı, turu sonlandığında baygın düşer.

languages.text: 使用者的{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}行动点数{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}移动点数{/g}恢复至上限，获得10次额外攻击。使用者造成的伤害提高100%，且无法陷入{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}眩晕{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}定身{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}倒地{/g}或昏迷状态，持续至{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束。回合结束时，使用者陷入昏迷状态。
languages.original_text: The user restores {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} to their maximum, gains +10 additional attacks, and until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, deals +100% more damage and cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, or fall unconscious. At the end of the turn, the user falls unconscious.

traits.locale_text: 使用者的{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}行动点数{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}移动点数{/g}恢复至上限，获得10次额外攻击。使用者造成的伤害提高100%，且无法陷入{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}眩晕{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}定身{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}倒地{/g}或{g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}昏迷{/g}状态，持续至{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束。回合结束时，使用者陷入昏迷状态。

languages.text: 使用者は{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}を最大値に回復し、+10の追加攻撃を得る。この{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}中は、攻撃力が+100%上昇し、スタン、{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}移動不能{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}転倒{/g}、または{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}気絶{/g}状態にならない。このターン終了時に、使用者は気絶状態になる。
languages.original_text: The user restores {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} to their maximum, gains +10 additional attacks, and until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, deals +100% more damage and cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, or fall unconscious. At the end of the turn, the user falls unconscious.

traits.locale_text: 使用者は{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}を最大値に回復し、+10の追加攻撃を得る。この{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}中は、攻撃力が+100%上昇し、スタン、{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}移動不能{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}転倒{/g}、または{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}気絶{/g}状態にならない。このターン終了時に、使用者は気絶状態になる。
